title: Remote-worker protocol wire shape (register/task/result/heartbeat, bidi)
purpose: Define the wire contract for out-of-process Tier-3 activity workers — the protocol every worker SDK (cluster AR) generates stubs from. This is the bidirectional-streaming gRPC service: workers register, the server pushes tasks, workers report results and heartbeats.
task: Add worker.proto declaring a bidirectional-streaming gRPC service with RegisterWorker, ActivityTask, ActivityResult, and Heartbeat messages. ActivityTask carries the activity type, input Payload, and the WorkflowId/ActivityId correlation; ActivityResult carries a result Payload or an ActivityError; Heartbeat carries liveness and optional progress; RegisterWorker carries the worker's namespace and the activity types it implements. Provide serde types and assert lossless round-trip. This brief defines the protocol; the server-side endpoint is AW-011/AW-012.

requirements.title: Bidirectional worker service
requirements.spec: THE SYSTEM SHALL define a gRPC service in worker.proto using bidirectional streaming, where the server pushes ActivityTask messages down the stream and the worker pushes ActivityResult and Heartbeat messages up it, opened by a RegisterWorker handshake.
acceptance: worker.proto defines a bidirectional-streaming RPC carrying a server->worker message (ActivityTask) and a worker->server message (RegisterWorker, ActivityResult, Heartbeat) as the two stream directions.
The transport is gRPC bidi streaming, not unary polling (per D7); the proto reflects push dispatch.
tonic-build generates the streaming service and the crate compiles.

requirements.title: Task, result, and heartbeat payloads
requirements.spec: THE SYSTEM SHALL define ActivityTask carrying activity type, input Payload, and WorkflowId/ActivityId correlation; ActivityResult carrying a result Payload or an ActivityError; and Heartbeat carrying liveness and optional progress.
acceptance: ActivityTask carries the activity type string, the input Payload, the owning WorkflowId, and the ActivityId for correlation.
ActivityResult carries either a success result Payload or an ActivityError (using aion-core's ActivityError shape via the AW-002 conversion, preserving the retryable/terminal classification).
Heartbeat carries the WorkflowId/ActivityId it concerns and an optional progress Payload.
A unit test round-trips ActivityTask, ActivityResult (both success and error), and Heartbeat through serde and proto encode/decode.

requirements.title: Worker registration advertisement
requirements.spec: THE SYSTEM SHALL define RegisterWorker carrying the worker's namespace and the list of activity types it implements.
acceptance: RegisterWorker carries a namespace and a repeated activity-type field.
RegisterWorker has a serde type deriving Serialize + Deserialize and round-trips losslessly.
The proto documents that registration scopes the worker to one namespace (server-side partitioning per D8 is AW-011).

boundaries: SHALL NOT implement the server-side worker registry, dispatch, or heartbeat handling — AW-011, AW-012.
SHALL NOT build any worker client — that is cluster AR.
SHALL NOT define how the engine surfaces a Tier-3 activity need — that is AE; this brief defines only the wire protocol.
verification: No #[allow], #[expect], or #[ignore] directives in new code.
